final_files.tests/test_final_mixed_history.py:
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path


ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def test_report_totals_survive_selective_erasure_and_keep_active_names():
    database = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    database.executescript(
        (ROOT / "sql" / "schema.sql").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    )
    database.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO customers(id, display_name) VALUES (?, ?)",
        [(1, "North Shop"), (2, "Closed Shop")],
    )
    database.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO payment_events(id, customer_id, cents, occurred_on) "
        "VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)",
        [
            (10, 2, 4000, "2026-05-01T09:00:00Z"),
            (11, 1, 1500, "2026-05-01T10:00:00Z"),
            (12, 2, 500, "2026-05-02T09:00:00Z"),
        ],
    )
    database.execute("DELETE FROM customers WHERE id = 2")

    report = (ROOT / "sql" / "history_report.sql").read_text(
        encoding="utf-8"
    )
    rows = database.execute(report).fetchall()

    assert [row[0] for row in rows] == [10, 11, 12]
    assert sum(row[3] for row in rows) == 6000
    assert [row[2] for row in rows] == [None, "North Shop", None]
